texto: Blessing is essentially the transformative experience of knowing and honoring God as the Giver
autor: it means valuing the steady flow that sustains the world even above the gift of life that each of us receives and is in time constrained to relinquish.
explicacao: Citação de it means valuing the steady flow that sustains the world even above the gift of life that each of us receives and is in time constrained to relinquish. sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Blessing is essentially the transformative experience of knowing and honoring God as the Giver” articula reflexao, ellen-f-davis, blessing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e reflexao.
